expectations.evidence: Functions mostly typed: _physics_process(delta: float) -> void, take_damage(amount: int) -> void. Some variables use := inference instead of explicit types.
Flat @export without grouping. Uses comments (# -- Tuning constants --) instead of @export_group().
Uses get_overlapping_bodies() (L199) instead of get_overlapping_areas(). This checks CharacterBody2D overlap, not Area2D, which conflates body collision with damage detection.
